rationale: Russian strikes on Kyiv continue without qualitative escalation for Romania's Black Sea security baseline; the Iran deal's energy price impact remains the most relevant ongoing development. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Russian attacks in Ukraine kill nine, damage historic Kyiv cathedral
top_events.summary: Continued Russian strikes near Romania's regional sphere remain at established baseline — no new qualitative escalation affecting Black Sea security this cycle.

top_events.title: US and Iran announce deal to end conflict; oil prices fall
top_events.summary: Confirmed US-Iran understanding pushes oil prices lower, offering modest relief on energy costs for Romanian households and the economy.

top_events.title: G7 meeting in France
top_events.summary: G7 agenda touches on trade and geopolitics relevant to EU members like Romania, but no confirmed policy outcomes yet.
